name: AHT10 Temperature and Humidity Sensor
description: ASAIR AHT10 calibrated digital temperature and humidity sensor, I2C (address 0x38), SMD LGA-6 package 4x5x1.6mm. Land pattern per manufacturer technical manual. Note: 1.8-3.6V supply; single device per I2C bus.
dimensions_source: ASAIR AHT10 Technical Manual: Fig.1 package 4x5x1.6mm (pad 1 round, pads 2-6 0.8 sq, col 2.7, row 1.27), Fig.8 recommended land pattern (PCB pads 1.27x1.0, col spacing 3.2, row pitch 1.27; pad 1 circle D1.0 per round-pad shape-match rule in 2.1), Table 5 pinout (ADR/SDA/SCL|VDD/GND/NC).
